name: Skills Library 1 - Binance Market
description: Read-only market and derivatives data skills.

skills.name: Price Snapshot
skills.description: Fetches spot last price and 24h change for one trading pair.
skills.author: skillsbrain

skills.name: Top Movers Radar
skills.description: Ranks strongest gainers by quote asset across spot pairs.
skills.author: skillsbrain

skills.name: Kline Brief
skills.description: Summarizes recent candles with trend percentage.
skills.author: skillsbrain

skills.name: Funding Watch
skills.description: Reads current funding, mark price and next funding time.
skills.author: skillsbrain

skills.name: Open Interest Scan
skills.description: Queries futures open interest for a symbol.
skills.author: skillsbrain

skills.name: Symbol Status Checker
skills.description: Checks trading status and filters from exchangeInfo.
skills.author: skillsbrain

skills.name: BSC RPC Fanout Check
skills.description: Benchmarks configured BSC RPC endpoints and returns fastest node.
skills.author: skillsbrain

openSourceCandidates.name: binance-mcp-server
openSourceCandidates.adaptation: Keep read-only market data tools and remove mutation tools.

openSourceCandidates.name: BinanceMCPServer
openSourceCandidates.adaptation: Reuse tool contracts and route through SkillsBrain API.
